integrity.description: Verify the agent actually executed the R code to generate the models and outputs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for signs of execution in an R console, RStudio environment, or terminal running 'Rscript chemometrics_analysis.R'. The outputs should not just be manually created empty files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent computed the predictions rather than hardcoding them.
integrity.visual_evidence: Examine the visible R script to ensure it uses functions like 'plsr()', 'RMSEP()', and 'predict()' rather than manually constructing dataframes with hardcoded numbers for the CSVs.

integrity.description: Verify the generated plots appear to be genuine R graphical outputs.
integrity.visual_evidence: The PNG files should look like standard R base graphics or ggplot2 outputs, containing appropriate axes, labels, and data points corresponding to the gasoline dataset.
